meaning: n.(去除眼袋、鱼尾纹等的)眼睑整容术
examples: Objective To report some improvement on the blepharoplasty.
Objective to study the clinical significance of lower eyelid topographic anatomy in lower blepharoplasty.
Objective To introduce an operation (the Oriental blepharoplasty) with middle incision for the double eyelid.
